commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=893fd7d18c809b4e4cc32b4d5b8a8e68dc742143)
commands.review_summary:
This PR changes Control UI chat session refreshes to request unscoped, untimed session lists for chat pickers and updates the related UI tests.

Reproducibility: yes. via source inspection: current main sends sessions.list with activeMinutes, limit, and agentId from the chat refresh paths, and the gateway filters by agentId and activeMinutes. I did not run the UI because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Maintainers need to choose the intended full-history session-list contract before this PR should be repaired or merged.

target.title: [codex] fix control ui chat session picker history
target.body:
## Summary
- Load the full session index for Control UI chat picker refreshes instead of applying the 120-minute window.
- Stop scoping chat session refreshes to the current agent so older Telegram/channel conversations from other agents can remain selectable.
- Keep current-agent command refresh behavior unchanged and update tests for the unscoped session list request.

## Root cause
The chat UI refreshed `sessions.list` with `activeMinutes`, `limit`, and an `agentId` derived from the current chat session. That made the picker miss older channel conversations and any Telegram sessions owned by a different agent even though the backend still returned them when queried without those filters.

## Validation
- `pnpm --dir ui exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts --project unit src/ui/app-chat.test.ts src/ui/app-gateway.sessions.node.test.ts src/ui/app-render.helpers.node.test.ts src/ui/views/chat.test.ts` (unit project: 84 tests passed)
- `pnpm --dir ui exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts --project unit-node src/ui/app-gateway.sessions.node.test.ts src/ui/app-render.helpers.node.test.ts` (87 tests passed)
- `pnpm ui:build`

Note: an initial broad UI test invocation expanded to the full suite and hit unrelated environment/preexisting failures: missing `openclaw/plugin-sdk/test-fixtures`, missing `ui/ui/index.html`, missing Playwright browser binaries, and an existing `tool-cards` assertion mismatch.
target.author: amknight

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
